qry:select.name: RS0
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_ape_y_nom TEXT , oi_referencia PID FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS, per02_personal_emp, per01_personal WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp is not null and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp = per02_personal_emp.oi_personal_emp and per02_personal_emp.oi_personal = per01_personal.oi_personal and oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT oi_reclutado ID, c_reclutado CODE, d_postulante TEXT , oi_referencia PID FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS, sel01_postulante WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante is not null and SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_postulante = sel01_postulante.oi_postulante and oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID}')/ROWS/ROW
